title: chenopodium rubrum f. humile
intro: Chenopodium rubrum f. humile, also known as Red Goosefoot, is a subspecies of the Chenopodium rubrum plant, a member of the amaranth family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chenopodium rubrum f. humile include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Chenopodium rubrum f. humile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional cooking, particularly in European and Middle Eastern cuisine.
